samples.xml_description:
<module id="width_8to16">
    <description>Implement a data width conversion circuit that converts 8-bit data input to 16-bit data output. The module provides two output ports: valid_out, which indicates the validity of the output data, and data_out, which represents the converted 16-bit output data. The first arriving 8-bit data should be placed in the higher 8 bits of the 16-bit data output. The valid_out and data_out signals are generated in the next clock cycle after the two data inputs. When there is only one data input, valid_out and data_out are not generated immediately. Instead, they wait for the arrival of the next data input to complete the concatenation of the two data inputs before generating valid_out and data_out. </description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal used for synchronous operation.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal. Defined as 0 for reset and 1 for reset signal inactive.</input>
        <input id="valid_in">Input signal indicating the validity of the input data.</input>
        <input id="data_in" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit input data to be converted.</input>
        <output id="valid_out">Output signal indicating the validity of the output data.</output>
        <output id="data_out" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit output data resulting from the width conversion.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter id="state_idle">0</parameter>
        <parameter id="state_1st">1</parameter>
        <parameter id="state_2nd">2</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" id="state">1'b0</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" id="data_lock" width_description="[7:0]">8'b0</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" id="flag">1'b0</reg>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        <case>
            <case_item>
                <condition>
                    <op id="clk">posedge</op>
                    <op id="negedge_rst_n">negedge</op>
                </condition>
                <action>
                    <assign id="data_out">16'b0</assign>
                </action>
            </case_item>
            <case_item>
                <condition>
                    <op id="state">==</op>
                    <op id="state_idle">state_idle</op>
                </condition>
                <action>
                    <if>
                        <condition>
                            <op id="valid_in">==</op>
                            <op id="1'b1">1'b1</op>
                        </condition>
                        <then>
                            <assign id="flag">
                                <op id="flag">+</op>
                                <op id="1'b1">1'b1</op>
                            </assign>
                            <assign id="data_lock">
                                <op id="data_lock">+</op>
                                <op id="data_in">data_in</op>
                            </assign>
                            <assign id="state">
                                <op id="state">+</op>
                                <op id="state_1st">state_1st</op>
                            </assign>
                        </then>
                        <else>
                            <assign id="state">
                                <op id="state">+</op>
                                <op id="state_idle">state_idle</op>
                            </assign>
                        </else>
                    </if>
                </action>
            </case_item>
            <case_item>
                <condition>
                    <op id="state">==</op>
                    <op id="state_1st">state_1st</op>
                </condition>
                <action>
                    <if>
                        <condition>
                            <op id="valid_in">==</op>
                            <op id="1'b1">1'b1</op>
                        </condition>
                        <then>
                            <assign id="data_out">
                                <op id="data_lock">data_lock</op>
                                <op id="data_in">data_in</op>
                            </assign>
                            <assign id="valid_out">
                                <op id="1'b1">1'b1</op>
                            </assign>
                            <assign id="flag">
                                <op id="flag">+</op>
                                <op id="1'b1">1'b1</op>
                            </assign>
                            <assign id="state">
                                <op id="state">+</op>
                                <op id="state_2nd">state_2nd</op>
                            </assign>
                        </then>
                        <else>
                            <assign id="data_out">
                                <op id="data_lock">data_lock</op>
                                <op id="8'b0">8'b0</op>
                            </assign>
                            <assign id="valid_out">
                                <op id="1'b1">1'b1</op>
                            </assign>
                            <assign id="state">
                                <op id="state">+</op>
                                <op id="state_idle">state_idle</op>
                            </assign>
                        </else>
                    </if>
                </action>
            </case_item>
            <case_item>
                <condition>
                    <op id="state">==</op>
                    <op id="state_2nd">state_2nd</op>
                </condition>
                <action>
                    <if>
                        <condition>
                            <op id="valid_in">==</op>
                            <op id="1'b1">1'b1</op>
                        </condition>
                        <then>
                            <assign id="data_out">
                                <op id="data_lock">data_lock</op>
                                <op id="data_in">data_in</op>
                            </assign>
                            <assign id="valid_out">
                                <op id="1'b1">1'b1</op>
                            </assign>
                            <assign id="state">
                                <op id="state">+</op>
                                <op id="state_1st">state_1st</op>
                            </assign>
                            <assign id="flag">
                                <op id="flag">+</op>
                                <op id="1'b1">1'b1</op>
                            </assign>
                        </then>
                        <else>
                            <assign id="data_out">
                                <op id="data_lock">data_lock</op>
                                <op id="8'b0">8'b0</op>
                            </assign>
                            <assign id="valid_out">
                                <op id="1'b1">1'b1</op>
                            </assign>
                            <assign id="state">
                                <op id="state">+</op>
                                <op id="state_idle">state_idle</op>
                            </assign>
                            <assign id="flag">
                                <op id="flag">+</op>
                                <op id="1'b1">1'b1</op>
                            </assign>
                        </else>
                    </if>
                </action>
            </case_item>
        </case>
    </implementation>
</module>
